message:
chore: regenerate coverage matrix + file cycle-1 review beads

Coverage: 107→104 RUST_NATIVE, 671→674 PY_WRAPPER (net: 3 generators
moved from native to Python wrappers — hypercube_graph, kneser_graph,
turan_graph — to restore the tuple-labelled node contract that the
Rust side violated). Totals unchanged (801).

Cycle-1 review beads filed (via direct JSONL append, br create CLI is
hanging in this session):

- grid2d  [HIGH]   grid_2d_graph strings vs tuples
- hypcub  [HIGH]   hypercube_graph ints vs tuples
- kneser  [HIGH]   kneser_graph strings vs tuples
- turan5  [MEDIUM] turan_graph partition ordering
- anftup  [HIGH]   add_nodes_from drops second element of hashable 2-tuples
- updatg  [HIGH]   Graph.update(Graph) crashes (adjacent find)

All six fixed inline in 923177e.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+| RUST_NATIVE | 104 | 12% | native extension exports from `franken_networkx._fnx` |
+| PY_WRAPPER | 674 | 84% | Python-defined exports with no runtime NetworkX dependency detected |

 | CONSTANT | 2 | 0% | public non-callable values |
